name: Tyropitta Roumeliotiki (Cheese Pie)
recipeIngredient: ½ cup Melted butter for brushing
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the feta cheese and mix with the beaten eggs.
2. Butter a baking pan that fits the phyllo pastry size.
3. Place four sheets of phyllo in the pan, brushing each one with melted butter. Spoon some of the cheese mixture onto the phyllo, then top with two more sheets, brushing them with butter. Repeat this process until all the cheese mixture is used up, setting aside 4 sheets of phyllo for the pie's top.
4. Score the pastry lightly in long strips.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 300°F for about 45 minutes.
6. Cut the scored strips into 2-inch pieces and serve hot. Serves 6-8.
